mapper.select: SELECT id, title, type, target, CASE WHEN status = 'ENABLED' THEN '启用' WHEN status = 'DRAFT' THEN '草稿' ELSE '停用' END AS status, sort_no, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS updated_at FROM admin_operation_config ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_operation_config (title, type, target, status, sort_no) VALUES (#{title}, #{type}, #{target}, #{status}, #{sortNo})
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_operation_config SET title = #{title}, type = #{type}, target = #{target}, status = #{status}, sort_no = #{sortNo} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT artist_name AS name, '' AS city, COALESCE(style_tags, '') AS tags, COALESCE(work_count, 0) AS works, CASE WHEN status = 'ACTIVE' THEN '上线' ELSE '下线' END AS status, id AS sort FROM artist_profile ORDER BY is_signed DESC, id DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT a.title AS name, ap.artist_name AS artist, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(a.current_price, 2)) AS price, COALESCE(a.inventory_available, 0) AS stock, CASE WHEN a.status = 'PUBLISHED' THEN '上架' WHEN a.status = 'COLLECTED' THEN '已收藏' WHEN a.status = 'SOLD_OUT' THEN '售罄' ELSE '下架' END AS status, '无' AS tag FROM artwork a LEFT JOIN artist_profile ap ON ap.id = a.artist_id ORDER BY a.created_at DESC LIMIT 100
mapper.update: INSERT INTO shipment_order (order_id, shipment_no, shipment_type, logistics_company, logistics_code, tracking_no, shipment_status, consigned_at) VALUES (#{orderId}, CONCAT('SHIP', #{orderId}), 'ARTWORK', #{company}, #{logisticsCode}, #{trackingNo}, 'SHIPPED', NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE logistics_company = #{company}, logistics_code = #{logisticsCode}, tracking_no = #{trackingNo}, shipment_status = 'SHIPPED', consigned_at = NOW();
mapper.select: SELECT nickname, user_no AS userNo, CASE gender WHEN 1 THEN '男' WHEN 2 THEN '女' ELSE '未知' END AS gender, CASE WHEN status = 'ENABLED' THEN '正常' ELSE '禁用' END AS status, DATE_FORMAT(last_login_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS lastLogin FROM user_account ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT o.order_no AS orderNo, COALESCE(u.nickname, CONCAT('用户#', o.buyer_user_id)) AS user, COALESCE(oi.item_title, '-') AS artwork, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(o.pay_amount, 2)) AS amount, o.order_status AS status, o.payment_status AS payStatus, COALESCE(so.shipment_status, '未发货') AS shipStatus FROM trade_order o LEFT JOIN user_account u ON u.id = o.buyer_user_id LEFT JOIN trade_order_item oi ON oi.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN shipment_order so ON so.order_id = o.id ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT 100
